./missing-semester
lectures past about

2019 Lectures

Tuesday, 1/15

  • Course Overview
  • Virtual Machines and Containers
  • Shell and Scripting

Thursday, 1/17

  • Command-line environment
  • Data Wrangling

Tuesday, 1/22

  • Editors
  • Version Control

Thursday, 1/24

  • Dotfiles
  • Backups
  • Automation
  • Machine Introspection

Tuesday, 1/29

  • Program Introspection
  • Package Management and Dependency Management
  • OS Customization
  • Remote Machines

Thursday, 1/31

  • Web and Browsers
  • Security and Privacy

Beyond MIT

We’ve also shared this class beyond MIT in the hopes that others may benefit from these resources. You can find posts and discussion on

  • Hacker News
  • Lobsters
  • r/learnprogramming
  • r/programming
  • Twitter
  • YouTube

Acknowledgments

This class was taught as part of SIPB IAP 2019 and co-sponsored by SIPB and MIT EECS.
